purpose: Route ambiguous sales-assistance requests to the narrowest child skill across research, meeting prep, and personalized outreach.
selection_order: Meeting preparation beats outbound drafting when a specific call or meeting is already in scope.
Outbound drafting beats general research when the main deliverable is a message rather than an intel brief.
Default to account research when the user still needs context before a call plan or outreach can be honest.

children.name: sales-call-prep
children.summary: Builds a practical prep brief for an upcoming sales conversation using meeting context, account history, attendee research, and recent company news.
route_when: The user is preparing for a discovery call, demo, negotiation, proposal review, check-in, or QBR.
The main output is a meeting brief, agenda, discovery questions, objection planning, or next-step proposal.
avoid_when: No meeting or call is in scope and the user mainly wants outreach copy.
The request is still at the research/intel stage with no need for a prep brief yet.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this child before routing when the runtime does not already include the meeting-prep skill.

children.name: sales-draft-outreach
children.summary: Drafts personalized outbound email or LinkedIn outreach after enough research exists to support a credible hook and clear CTA.
route_when: The user wants cold email, warm outreach, LinkedIn outreach, re-engagement, or a follow-up message drafted.
The main deliverable is personalized outbound copy rather than a research brief or meeting plan.
avoid_when: The user is preparing for a live meeting and needs a call brief instead of message copy.
The request lacks enough context to support a credible hook and should start with research.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this child before routing when the runtime does not already include the outbound drafting skill.

children.name: account-research
children.summary: Builds an account or contact intelligence brief from web, enrichment, and CRM context before outreach or meeting prep.
route_when: The user asks to research a company, person, domain, or account before sales action.
The request still needs recent news, qualification signals, key people, or company context before a call plan or outreach draft would be honest.
avoid_when: A specific meeting brief is the immediate need.
The user already has enough context and explicitly wants outbound copy.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this child before routing when the runtime does not already include the research skill.
